tasks.name: PerformanceHeadroom
prompts: Use the SystemInfo skill to get current free RAM in GB and free disk space in GB. Then use the FileAccess skill to append a single CSV row to data/performanceheadroom.csv. The row must be: timestamp,free_ram_gb,free_disk_gb with values formatted as YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS for the timestamp and two decimal places for the numbers. If the file does not yet exist, write a header row first (timestamp,free_ram_gb,free_disk_gb) then append the data row. Do not include any explanation in the file - only the CSV content.
